title: Hero's Elytra Optimizer
description: Fixes elytras to not make you keep gliding when you don't have an elytra on
body:
<details>
<summary>4.5.0 Edit</summary>

```
/h-ely debug
- Enables debug messages
/h-ely open
- Opens the config
/h-ely save
- Reloads the config (unnecessary unless edited with the open command)
/h-ely glide [off/delayed/on]
- Sets the per-server state of the glide-stopping optimization
/h-ely rocket [off/delayed/on]
- Sets the per-server state of the rocket-boost optimization
/h-ely pivot [0.0<=input<1.8)
- Adjusts the pivot point
/h-ely offset [0.0<=input<0.6)
- Adjusts the vertical offset
/h-ely instaGlide
- Removes going into the glide animation (from standing to glide animation)
```

</details>




**What does it do?**
- Optimization that fixes a long standing bug where your elytra being taken off doesnt make you stop flying

**Is this allowed?**
- Allowed nearly everywhere but please ask before using on any servers that aren't on this list or haven't explicitly allowed it.

**How to use?**
- Plop into your minecraft mod folder
- Make sure to have fabric api

**Compatibility**
- Should work with any mods that don't edit an elytra's functionality. Might have problems with modded items that allow a player to fly since it won't let you glide without wearing an elytra.

**Contact Me:**
- Any problems, questions, help:
https://discord.gg/4ta7pM4bnr
Let me know if there are any problems in my discord!
